query:
SELECT a.id, a.lojaId, a.nomeLoja, a.totalItensStock, a.totalComFichas, a.totalSemFichas, a.createdAt
FROM analises_stock a
WHERE a.dadosStock LIKE '%6569BYPV%' OR a.resultadoAnalise LIKE '%6569BYPV%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT a.id, a.lojaId, a.nomeLoja, a.totalItensStock, a.totalComFichas, a.totalSemFichas, a.createdAt
FROM analises_stock a
WHERE a.dadosStock LIKE '%6569BYPV%' OR a.resultadoAnalise LIKE '%6569BYPV%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
